If any test fails, report the full error output so I can fix it. Do NOT modify any files — just run and report.

content.text:
I don't have permission to run Bash commands right now. To execute this test, I need Bash access.

**What I was trying to do:**
Run the command you specified:
```bash
cd /home/yingbohao/llm-train && python tests/test_mxfp_quant.py
```

This would execute the MXFP quantization test suite and capture all output (including any error messages) so I could report results back to you.

**How to proceed:**
You can either:
1. **Grant Bash permission** so I can run the command for you.
2. **Run it yourself** in your terminal and paste the output here — I'll analyze any failures for you.
